title: pilosella dolinensis
intro: Pilosella dolinensis, also known as the Dolin's mouse-ear or a type of dandelion, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its use as an anti-inflammatory agent and its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria. The health benefits of Pilosella dolinensis include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion, making it a useful treatment for conditions such as hypertension and gastrointestinal disorders. Traditional herbal preparations of Pilosella dolinensis include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
